name: Enter Historical Lay-bys
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lay-by transactions allow you to allocate stock to a customer, holding that stock while the customer repays the full amount in incremental transactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Prior to launching Retail Express you can enter any existing Lay-by transaction from your previous system. Typically these Lay-bys are entered in the week leading up to launching Retail Express. Otherwise once entered any additional payments received by customers would need to be entered in the current system "}, {"text": "and ", "italic": true}, {"text": "Retail Express, to ensure that both systems are up-to-date."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Prerequisites:"}], "data-id": "prerequisites"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before proceeding you will need to ensure the following steps have already been completed:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Lay-by "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " uploaded into your Retail Express database (typically this is done during the Implementation, but if required you can "}, {"text": "create new products"}, {"text": ")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your "}, {"text": "Customers ", "bold": true}, {"text": "uploaded into the Retail Express database (alternatively these can be "}, {"text": "created in POS"}, {"text": " as you create each sale)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "An enabled "}, {"text": "Payment Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " to allocate the payment against"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Using the "None" "}, {"text": "Payment Type"}, {"text": " will allow you to finalise the transaction without taking a physical payment, and allow you to separate the payment on the Income Report."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating Lay-by transactions"}], "data-id": "creating-lay-by-transactions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enter an existing Lay-by:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open "}, {"text": "POS", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "New Sale ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and enter the code for the staff member who originally made the sale"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The sale should be entered against the original staff member to ensure that Staff reports are accurate; if this is not required you can use any valid staff member code"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add the products", "bold": true}, {"text": " to the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Customer ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab and add the customer to the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Fulfilment ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab and change the "}, {"text": "Fulfilment Method"}, {"text": " to Layby"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powh3EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powh3EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_laybypickupicon (1).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Dispatch", "bold": true}, {"text": " quantity for any of the items that have already been provided to the customer e.g. if the customer ordered 10 but has taken 5, enter the remaining 5 into the Dispatch field"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Outlet/Register ", "bold": true}, {"text": "field at the bottom of the screen to modify the "}, {"text": "Order Date ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to the date of the original order."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pox04EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pox04EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_changeinvoicedate (1).gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Payment ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab and enter any payments that have been received against the sale"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Using the "None" "}, {"text": "Payment Type"}, {"text": " will allow you to finalise the transaction without taking a physical payment, and allow you to separate the payment on the Income Report."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Payment Date ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to the original date the payment was received by double clicking on the payment"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pox09EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pox09EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_changepaymentdate.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Finalise ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to finalise the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat for any additional Lay-bys"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Refer to the "}, {"text": "POS - Create a Layby/Layaway sale"}, {"text": " article for more detailed information on entering laybys."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Finalisation (end of day/stock levels)"}], "data-id": "finalisation-end-of-day-stock-levels"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As a result of entering historical transactions your system will have:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Recorded payments to be reconciled through the POS End of Day/Cash up process"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reduced Stock levels for any products added to the sales"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once all historical transactions (including any Credit Notes and Vouchers) have been entered you should process the following:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "End of Day/Cash Up"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Adjustment"}, {"text": " - this can be done either via a Stock Take or Mass Upload; refer to the article on "}, {"text": "Setting your starting Inventory Levels"}, {"text": " for more information"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If the End of Day/Cash Up is not completed all historical payments will "}, {"text": "appear in the first End of Day", "bold": true}, {"text": " processed in Retail Express. This may make it difficult to reconcile."}]}], "appearance": "info"}]
